text:
:—Even as we have best friends, ordinary
friends, neutrals, enemies and inveterate foes, so do the planets

16 FUNDAMENTALS OF ASTROLOGY
in their life. The following Table gives the friends, neutrals
and enemies of the several planets. This is their inborn or
natural relationship. There is also another kind of friendship
called Temporary or Tatkalika. Now look at the Table giving
the first type of relations.
Planets Friends. Neutrals. Enemies.
Sun Moon, Mars Mercury. Venus &
& Jupiter. Saturn.
Moon Sun & Mercury, The rest. Nil.
Mars Sun. Moon & Venus & Saturn Mercury.
Jupiter.
Mercury Sun & Venus. Mars. Jup.& Sat. Moon
Jupiter Sun. Moon & Saturn. Mercury &
Mars. Venus.
Venus Mercury & Saturn. Mars & Juptier. S un & Moon.
Saturn Mercury & Jupiter. Sun, Moon
Venus. & Mars.
Rahu & Mercury, Mars. Sun, Moon &
Ketu Saturn & Venus. Jupiter.
According to others Rahu is the enemy of the Sun, Moon
and Mars; and neutral to Jupiter, while Ketu is neutral to
Mercury.
